name: Banana Smunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash one banana into a measuring cup and measure an equal amount of peanut butter.
2. Mash the very ripe bananas until they form a smooth paste, then mix in the peanut butter.
3. Chill the mixture well. Spoon 2 tablespoons onto one graham cracker square and top with another square.
4. Freeze until ready to use.
1 serving contains 188 calories, 1 starch, 1 medium fat meat, 1 fat exchange, 20 grams carbohydrate, 7 grams protein, 11 grams fat, and 118 mg sodium. Adapted from Exchanges for All Occasions by Marion Franz, 1993 edition. Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Jan 94.
